channel.title: VBM Interior Blog — Interior Design Tips & Trends
channel.description: Interior design tips, trends, and inspiration from VBM Interior — Chennai's trusted interior design company founded in 2017 with 200+ completed projects.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2017-2026 VBM Interior. All rights reserved.

item.title: Interior Design Trends 2026: What's Shaping Homes in Chennai
item.description: From warm minimalism and fluted textures to AI-driven design and earthy luxury — here are the top interior trends defining 2026 homes in Chennai and beyond.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Vastu-Compliant Interior Design: A Complete Guide for Chennai Homes
item.description: Learn how to design vastu-compliant interiors for your Chennai home — room placement, color choices, material selection, and practical tips that blend tradition with modern aesthetics.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: False Ceiling Designs: Types, Costs & 2026 Ideas for Every Room
item.description: Explore false ceiling design options — POP, gypsum, wooden, metal, and more. Compare costs, learn what works for each room, and get 2026 design inspiration.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Wardrobe Design Ideas: Smart Storage Solutions for Every Bedroom
item.description: Discover wardrobe design ideas that maximize storage — sliding wardrobes, walk-in closets, loft storage, and smart organization solutions for Indian bedrooms.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: 10 Interior Design Mistakes That Waste Your Money (And How to Avoid Them)
item.description: Avoid these 10 costly interior design mistakes — from poor space planning and wrong material choices to ignoring lighting and ventilation. Save money on your Chennai home project.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: How Long Does Interior Design Take? A Realistic Timeline for Chennai Homes
item.description: Get a realistic timeline for your interior design project — from consultation to handover. Learn what affects timelines and how VBM Interior delivers on schedule.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Living Room Interior Design Ideas for Indian Homes: 2026 Inspiration Guide
item.description: Get inspired with living room design ideas perfect for Indian homes — color palettes, furniture layouts, lighting, TV unit designs, and decor tips for 2026.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: How to Choose the Best Interior Designers in Chennai
item.description: A comprehensive guide to choosing the best interior designers in Chennai — what to look for, questions to ask, red flags to avoid, and why VBM Interior stands out.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Complete Guide to Modular Kitchen Design in Chennai
item.description: Everything you need to know about modular kitchen design in Chennai — layouts, materials, costs, appliance integration, and tips from VBM Interior's kitchen experts.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Interior Design Cost in Chennai 2026: Complete Price Guide
item.description: Complete price guide for interior design in Chennai — 2BHK, 3BHK, kitchen, bedroom costs, what affects pricing, and how to get the best value for your budget.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Multiple Wallpaper Design Ideas for Every Room
item.description: Discover creative wallpaper design ideas for every room — from textured wallpapers for living rooms to subtle patterns for bedrooms. Find the perfect wallpaper to elevate your interior.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Small Spaces, Big Style: Design Tips for a Small Space Makeover
item.description: Smart interior design tips for small spaces — maximize every square foot with clever storage, multi-functional furniture, and visual tricks that make compact homes feel spacious.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior

item.title: Creating Affordable Luxury in Interior Design
item.description: Learn how to achieve luxury interiors on a budget — smart material choices, design hacks, and VBM Interior's affordable luxury packages starting from ₹3 Lakh for 2BHK.
item.dc:creator: VBM Interior
